goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'modern american' food and should be in the 'centre'.
The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'italian' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant' and should be in the 'north'.
The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 4'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'hotel type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve modern american food and should be in the centre
The restaurant should be in the expensive price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food
Make sure you get phone number and address
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same price range as the restaurant and should be in the north
The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 4
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the centre
Make sure you get phone number and hotel type
